items.name: Subiksha
items.quote: Tally made easy — very high energy classes. The practical lab sessions made me workplace-ready by the time I finished. Got placed within a month of completing the course.
items.achievement: Placed within 1 month of course completion

items.name: Nithish
items.quote: FA helped me gain valuable experiences beyond just academics — the sessions on life, leadership, and charity shaped who I am today as much as the coursework did.

items.name: Sasivarman
items.quote: Great presentation style with real life examples that make even the driest accounting topics come alive. I never struggled to stay engaged in any session at FA.

items.name: Vikram
items.quote: The regular tests, meditation sessions, and confident teaching style genuinely improved my exam performance. I went in calm and prepared — that made all the difference.

items.name: Meena Krishnan
items.quote: Finance Academy transformed my understanding of accounting. I went from struggling to scoring in the top 5% of my batch — in a single semester.

items.name: Ravi Kumar
items.quote: The question bank of 10,000+ questions is FA's real advantage. Nothing in the exam could surprise me. I cleared with distinction.
